Class Jeu

java.lang.Object
fr.uge.backpackhero.Jeu
public final class Jeu extends Object
Main controller for the game logic. Manages the state transitions between exploration, combat, and menus.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Jeu(Heros heros, Dungeon donjon, ViewGraphic vg1, ViewGraphic vg2)
    Constructs the game instance and sets the initial position.

  • Constructor Details

    • Jeu

      public Jeu(Heros heros, Dungeon donjon, ViewGraphic vg1, ViewGraphic vg2)
      Constructs the game instance and sets the initial position.
      Parameters:
      heros - the player character.
      donjon - the dungeon structure containing levels.
      vg1 - the primary graphical view handler.
      vg2 - secondary view handler (reserved for future use).

  • Method Details

    • deplacer

      public void deplacer(int dx, int dy)
      Attempts to move the hero by a given offset and triggers room interaction.
      Parameters:
      dx - horizontal displacement.
      dy - vertical displacement.

    • updateCombatState

      public void updateCombatState()
      Checks the ongoing combat state and handles transitions to win or loss.

    • lancerCombat

      public void lancerCombat(List<Ennemi> enemies)
      Initializes a combat session against a list of enemies.
      Parameters:
      enemies - the list of adversaries in the room.

    • moveToNextFloor

      public void moveToNextFloor()
      Manages transition to the next dungeon floor or sets the game to victory mode.

    • notifier

      public void notifier(String message)
      Records a notification message to be displayed by the graphical engine.
      Parameters:
      message - the text to display.

    • pollMessage

      public String pollMessage()
      Retrieves and clears the pending notification message.
      Returns:
      the last notification message or null if empty.

    • setMode

      public void setMode(Mode mode)

    • getMode

      public Mode getMode()

    • getCombat

      public Combat getCombat()

    • getDonjon
